sub_operations.operation_name: Saw cut Ø14 round bar to 64 mm blank length

setups.setup_name: Lathe first-end face and left DIN centre hole

sub_operations.operation_name: Face first end of Ø14 blank
Center drill left DIN 332-R2 x 4.25 centre hole

setups.setup_name: Lathe second-end face to length and right DIN centre hole

sub_operations.operation_name: Face second end to 61.4 mm overall length
Center drill right DIN 332-R1.6 x 3 centre hole

setups.setup_name: Between-centres CNC turning of shaft blank, shoulders, reliefs and chamfers

sub_operations.operation_name: Rough turn overall gear blank envelope from Ø14 to Ø11.79 max OD region
Turn left datum journal A region to Ø7 nominal pre-grind geometry over 9 mm
Turn left annular relief groove, 1.5 mm axial width
Turn left shoulder chamfers 0.2 x 45° and 0.3 x 45°
Turn intermediate gear-end cylindrical step to Ø10 nominal
Turn right main shaft journal region to Ø9 nominal over 16 mm
Turn right shoulder relief / 1 mm transition before Ø6 k6 journal
Turn right datum journal B region to Ø6 nominal over 5.9 mm
Turn right transition chamfer 0.5 x 45° and local 10° lead form
In-process check of pre-heat turned coaxial shaft blank

setups.setup_name: Gear hobbing of 9-tooth right-hand helical gear

sub_operations.operation_name: Hob 9T helical external gear, mn 1, 20° PA, 15° RH helix

setups.setup_name: Gear tooth end edge details A and B

sub_operations.operation_name: Machine gear tooth end detail A on left side, R0.4 / 15° / 0.2 / 1.45
Machine gear tooth end detail B on right side, R0.4 / 15° / 0.2 / 1.45
Case harden and temper 16MnCrS5 to 700+100 HV10, Eht 0.3+0.2 mm

setups.setup_name: OD grind datum and bearing journals between centres

sub_operations.operation_name: OD grind left datum journal A Ø7 h6 over 9 mm
OD grind right main shaft journal Ø9 x6 over 16 mm
OD grind right datum journal B Ø6 k6 over 5.9 mm
In-process inspect ground journals and A-B runout

setups.setup_name: Finish gear grind and tooth hone/measure

sub_operations.operation_name: Gear grind 9T helical tooth form to final gauge and runout
Teeth hone / superfinish gear flanks as required for Rz 6 and working error
In-process gear measurement: gauge over 2 teeth, composite error, runout to A-B
Deburr all sharp edges, reliefs, centre holes and gear tooth end details
Clean part after deburr and grinding residue removal

setups.setup_name: Final dimensional, gear, hardness and surface-finish inspection

sub_operations.operation_name: Final dimensional check of Ø7 h6, Ø9 x6, Ø6 k6 journals and runout to A-B
Final gear inspection: tooth count, gauge over 2 teeth, composite errors and runout
Final hardness, case depth and surface texture verification
